title: Data derived reservoir model implemented in PCR-GLOBWB2
author: Steyaert, Jennie
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Contains all model files to run the data derived operations described in Steyaert et al., 2025. For a more indepth model description, please read Sutandujaja et al., 2018 (https://gmd.copernicus.org/articles/11/2429/2018). PCR-GLOBWB2 is still in development and more recent versions can be found at  https://github.com/UU-Hydro/  PCR-GLOBWB_model
